title: Shot Glass Measuring Cup 4 Ounce/120ML Liquid Heavy High Espresso Glass Cup Black Line，V-Shaped Spout
description:
About this item
[EASY TO READE]Easily measure and transport smaller amounts without them spilling; steadier than using measuring spoons; perfect for kitchen, home, lawn, and garden
[HEAVYWEIGHT GLASS] allows clear view of contents for more control and accuracy; weighted base helps reduce tipping for less mess
[CONVENIENT INDICATION]With line markings graduated in millilters ,fluid ounces and cups all the way up to 4oz, this mini measuring glass has the information you're looking for
[THICK and DURABLE] The Thick, Durable Sham provides stability, this measuring glass is perfectly balanced to sit safely on bar or kitchen counters as you delegate the necessary ingredients
[MULTI-PURPOSE LIQUID ]Dry 4OZ/120ML measures dry and liquid ingredients for creating balanced recipes, mixing delicious beverages, making craft cocktails, and more
reviews_5s:
I needed a little bit bigger measurer than 3 ounces. Appears to give accurate measurement up to 4 oz.
Also shows measurement in cups and Milileters. Good value. Good quality glass. Markings are clear and correct. Cleans easily.My amazing wife is an avid coffee drinking.

Easy to read the markings as well as cleanup. The size is great too. Thick glass and very durable.This glass is great! Heavy weight, clear markings. Perfect size for measuring shots or other ingredients. This is a must-have addition for the kitchen.It is made of heavy glass and liquids pour out properly. It works as I would expect.Solid glass cup with clear and exact markings. Very easy to use 👌... or if it is, that's a heck of a shot. 4 ounces is a half-cup -- great for measuring those smaller quantities. Plus, the glass in the base is really thick, so it's a bit harder to tip over.Very sturdy and good quality!I love this little gem! I use it for baking as well as cooking. It's heavyweight. It stands steady whether empty or filled. Good buy on my part.Exactly what I was looking for. Well made ,well designed and made to last. I've learned from past purchased Ackers products that Ackers sells QUALITY products.Perfect for home bar use and making new recipes.
reviews_1s: These are off by about 5-7ml. Horrible purchase if your trying to get exact measurements.
